s1.title: 1. Who We Are
s1.body: Croma is a product of Aurora33 (we, us, our). We operate the image compression tool available at croma.aurora33.org. Croma requires no registration or account and collects no identifiable personal data. This Policy explains what information is involved when you use the Service.

s2.title: 2. Data We Process
s2.intro: We do not ask for your name, email, or password. The only information involved is:

items.label: Uploaded files:
items.text: your images are processed temporarily and deleted automatically after one hour. We do not store, inspect, or share them.

items.label: Technical data:
items.text: temporary server logs (IP address, browser type) generated automatically to operate and protect the Service.

items.label: Local preferences:
items.text: your language and theme (light/dark) are stored in your own browser (localStorage and a language cookie), not on our servers.

s3.title: 3. How We Use This Information
s3.intro: The information above is used solely to:

items.label: Provide the Service:
items.text: receive, compress, and return your images.

items.label: Security and stability:
items.text: prevent abuse and keep the Service running through technical logs.

s3.outro: We do not use your data for marketing, newsletters, or profiling, because we collect no contact information.

s4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
s4.intro: We process technical information under the following legal bases:

items.label: Legitimate interest:
items.text: to operate, protect, and improve the Service.

s5.title: 5. Data Sharing
s5.intro: We do not sell or trade personal data. Technical information may pass through:

items.label: Hosting provider:
items.text: the infrastructure running the Service processes requests temporarily to deliver your result.

items.label: Legal authorities:
items.text: only when required by law or to protect the rights and safety of Aurora33 or its users.

s6.title: 6. Data Retention
s6.body: Uploaded images are deleted automatically about one hour after processing. Technical logs are kept only as long as necessary to operate and protect the Service. Since there are no accounts, we store no long-term personal data.

s8.title: 7. Cookies
s8.body: We use only one essential cookie to remember your language. We do not use analytics or advertising cookies.

s9.title: 8. Security
s9.body: We apply industry-standard measures: encrypted HTTPS transport, automatic deletion of uploaded files, and restricted server access. Since we collect no passwords or account data, there are no credentials that could be leaked.

s10.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
s10.body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will revise the Last updated date at the top of this page. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised Policy.

s11.title: 10. Contact
s11.body: For privacy questions, contact Aurora33 at
